[basic user at basic user (*) common european framework of reference (cef) level social skills and competences - tolerant, able to adapt to different points of view, cultures, ways of thinking, etc. have worked, studied and gone out with people from different countries, races, religion and ideals, and also lived - good communication skills, experience in dealing with many kinds of people, from kids to adults. have taught judo to people from 4 to 50 years old for 6 years, in some cases helped by my mentor and others alone. have met people from many different places, mainly from spain but also from europe and usa, in the courses held in summers from 2009 to 2011 - comfortable in presentations, as am used to in university and participated in the sixth pegasus aiaa student conference held in seville in april 2010. have learnt presentations skills at the school of engineering and in the courses of universidad internacional menéndez pelayo, manage presentation times, and vary speed accordingly in real time. - good speech skills, acquired in the courses taken in summers from 2009 to 2011. also participated in euroavia's seville fly in, where many students from europe came to our city, as we had just joined the euroavia association, so am really used to converse in english. page 2 / 3 - of for more information on europass go to http://europass.cedefop.europa.eu francisco javier mateo bonilla o european union, 2002-2010 24082010 organisational skills and competences - leadership, usually taking leader responsibilities when working in teams. this is especially true at university, where people don't usually like to take decisions that can affect the success of the project. - proficient in gathering data and presenting according solutions. - effective at time management and prioritising tasks to achieve deadlines. have never failed a deadline, and rarely have to work on the last moments, - good time organization, even when other people are involved or when times are not certainly defined. - very responsible, always prioritizing work over pleasure. technical skills and competences - good knowledge of automated control, especially of dynamic systems, learnt through the implementation of an automatic aircraft light system for the 6th pegasus aiaa conference and the development of an arduino based autopilot for a radio controlled aircraft. - basic knowledge of neural networks applied to the identification and control of processes. - knowledge of numerical methods. final year thesis on numerical analysis of supersonic wings. computer skills and competences - intermediate knowledge of general purposes programing languages (c, c++). - highly proficient in office applications (word, excel, access, powerpoint) and latex (especially lyx, a document processor based on latex). - advanced knowledge of matlab and simulink, experience in solving many different kinds of engineering and mathematical problems. - experience in html, php and other web oriented languages such as javascript, mysql or css. - basic to intermediate knowledge of other engineering tools such as mathematica, proteus, spice, nastran-patran, ansys, catia, pba pro and agi's stk. - knowledge of other specialized languages such as ccs for microchip (simulated in proteus and implemented directly in a pic), lua, and in-game console languages, other skills and competences - judoka since 1995. black belt achieved in 2005. experience as competitor, trainer and judge. organization of lots of judo events, most of them for children but also for adults, - regular player of tennis, football, basketball and also other team sports, - eventual player of paddle. - user knowledge of electronics, from computers to radios, domotics systems, robotics, radio control, simulation, etc. am very interested in those subjects, as they are related to automatic control, programming, airplanes... driving licence(s) b additional information - single. - free to work anywhere. - passionate of aeronautics and astronautics. - really hardworking. page 3 / 3 - of for more information on europass go to http//europass.cedefop.europa.eu francisco javier mateo bonilla
